modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to play DVDs after attempting to install VLC Media Player.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues with DVD playback on their computer. They are trying to install VLC Media Player but are encountering problems. This situation arose during a live chat session with a help desk analyst.
short_description: Unable to play DVDs after attempting to install VLC Media Player.
description: The user is experiencing issues with DVD playback on their computer. They are trying to install VLC Media Player but are encountering problems. This situation arose during a live chat session with a help desk analyst.
